# project-Cortex-ChatGpt-clone

# CORTEX — ChatGPT-style Clone

A multi-model AI chat app built with Streamlit and LlamaIndex, powered by Groq's LPU inference.

**Live demo:** https://cortex-chatgpt-clone-9wszapn7nfz2nb9txmitqr.streamlit.app/

**Stack:** Streamlit · LlamaIndex · Groq (Llama 3.3 70B, GPT-OSS 20B/120B) · Python

**Features:** model switching, streaming chat, auto-generated conversation titles, session chat history.
